title: Intensely Smoky Norwegian Lamb Skewers
description: A sour and shaggy Norwegian dish featuring lamb skewers with molasses, char-grilled to perfection on a tava griddle, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Preheat the tava griddle to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together molasses, olive oil, apple cider vinegar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the tava griddle with a small amount of olive oil to prevent sticking
Place the lamb skewers on the tava griddle and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally
After 5 minutes of cooking, sprinkle the chopped rosemary over the lamb skewers
Continue cooking until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit
Remove the skewers from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving
